raw.raw_text: When I try to export my dashboard to CSV the download starts but the file is 0 bytes. Tried with three different dashboards (analytics, revenue, user-activity), same result every time. Chrome 124 and Safari 17.4, both logged in normally. The browser console shows 'GET /api/export/csv 200' so it's not a network error — the response body is just empty. Expected the CSV to contain the dashboard data.

reproduction_steps: Try to export dashboard to CSV
Download starts but file is 0 bytes
Tried with multiple dashboards: analytics, revenue, user-activity

fields.expected_result: CSV should contain the dashboard data.

The issue persists across multiple dashboards and browsers.
